parts.text: You are an experienced financial controller. Based on the KPIs below, write a short morning briefing for management in English. Return a punchy headline, 2 to 4 short key points (one insight each, one sentence, no fluff), a single watch flag, and a rating. Data for {{ $json.briefing_date }}: daily revenue = {{ $json.revenue_day }} PLN, daily margin = {{ $json.margin_day_pct }}%. Last 7 days: revenue = {{ $json.revenue_7d }} PLN, margin = {{ $json.margin_7d_pct }}%. Previous 7 days: revenue = {{ $json.revenue_prev7d }} PLN, margin = {{ $json.margin_prev7d_pct }}%. Week-over-week change: revenue {{ $json.wow_revenue_pct }}%, margin {{ $json.wow_margin_pp }} percentage points. Pay special attention when revenue rises while margin falls.
